calendar.matters:
Petition For Order To Modify Trust
Off Calendar Apr-27-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Caitlin Carey for and with (trustee) Johnny Smith.

The Court stated that it has read through all of the filings and asked counsel if she is relying on 15409. Ms. Carey stated that she is as well as 15403, that they submitted their legal argument in their declaration, that the trust was funded with beneficial interest, that title has not passed due to litigation, that there were some holdups with the funding but that it is pretty well wrapped up, that it is important to get the Special Needs Trust (SNT) set up, that the beneficiary has many health issues, that all of the other sibling received their share outright and that the clear intent was to make the assets last for his lifetime. The Court asked why not file a petition to modify the parent trust. Ms. Carey responded that they would have to notice all of the siblings, that they do not get along, that more litigation would ensue, that he will not qualify for benefits and that he is unable to pay his rent. The petition for order to modify trust was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
